items.summary: Update the default emergency contact name to 'Aditya Patel' and phone number to '9546530546' in the Settings page pre-populated defaults, so that on first load or when no profile exists, these values are automatically filled in.

Update the backend default emergency contact data so that the stored emergency contact is initialized with name 'Aditya Patel' and phone '9546530546' for all users who have not customized their contact.

Update the Home page to prominently display the emergency contact name 'Aditya Patel' and number '9546530546', with a large, clearly visible CALL NOW button that initiates a call to 9546530546 via the tel: protocol. The page should communicate that anyone — girls, boys, or children — in danger can use this to call for help.
